title: Savory Crumbly Venezulan Collards Stir-fry
description: A spicy and flavorful solo-dinner dish featuring crumbly collards sauteed with a blend of aromatic spices, ready in under 30 minutes for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Wash and roughly chop the collard leaves.
Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent.
Add finely chopped garlic and jalapeno peppers, stirring for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Toss in cumin seeds and salt. Continue to cook until the mixture starts to stick together slightly.
Fold in the chopped collard leaves and continue cooking for another 5-7 minutes or until they are wilted but still have some crunch.
Garnish with red pepper flakes if desired, then serve hot.
